message:
fix(core): resolve clippy unused variable warning in wezterm.rs

Prefix pane_id with underscore in pane_tiered_scrollback_summary since
the parameter is only used inside #[cfg(all(feature = "vendored", unix))]
block, causing an unused variable error in non-vendored builds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
